name: Gajah Mada
quote: I will not taste spice until Nusantara is unified under Majapahit.

name: Sukarno
quote: We, the people of Asia and Africa, can mobilize the moral violence of nations in the cause of peace.

name: Mohammad Hatta
quote: Colonialism has to die. That is our contribution to the world.

name: R.A. Kartini
quote: There is no path to independence for my people that does not pass through education.

name: H.O.S. Tjokroaminoto
quote: The unity of the Islamic community is the key to the liberation of the Indies people.

name: Jan Pieterszoon Coen
quote: There is nothing in the world that gives a better profit than trade in the Indies, when it is managed as it should be.

name: Prince Diponegoro
quote: I am fighting for God and for the welfare of my people. I will not surrender.

name: Multatuli (Eduard Douwes Dekker)
role: Colonial Critic & Author of Max Havelaar (1820–1887)
quote: Max Havelaar or the Coffee Auctions of the Dutch Trading Company — a book written to convince the King of the Netherlands to grant justice to his 30 million Indonesian subjects.

name: Suharto
quote: Development is our highest priority. Political stability is the prerequisite for development.

name: D.N. Aidit
quote: The peasants and workers of Indonesia must not wait. They must take the land and the factories into their own hands.

name: B.J. Habibie
quote: Democracy must be our guide. I promised to deliver free and fair elections, and I kept that promise.

name: Abdurrahman Wahid (Gus Dur)
quote: Pluralism is not a concession — it is the foundation of Indonesia. Without it, we have nothing.

name: Megawati Sukarnoputri
quote: I will continue my father's struggle for a just and prosperous Indonesia that belongs to all its people.

name: Susilo Bambang Yudhoyono
quote: Democracy is the will of the Indonesian people. I am proud to be the first president directly elected by the people.

name: Joko Widodo (Jokowi)
quote: I am not an elite. I come from the rakyat — the ordinary people — and I will work for the rakyat.

name: Prabowo Subianto
quote: Indonesia must be strong, self-reliant, and sovereign. We will feed our own people with our own hands.

name: Sri Mulyani Indrawati
role: Minister of Finance (2005–2010, 2016–present); former World Bank MD
quote: Fiscal credibility is the foundation of everything. Without it, Indonesia cannot build anything lasting.

name: Anies Baswedan
quote: A leader must speak truth to power. Democracy means the state serves the people, not the other way around.

name: Retno Marsudi
role: Foreign Minister 2014–2024; first woman Foreign Minister of Indonesia
quote: Indonesia's foreign policy is a million friends, zero enemies. We choose engagement over confrontation.

name: General A.H. Nasution
role: Army Chief of Staff; survived G30S coup attempt (1965)
quote: The Indonesian Army is not a hired professional force. It is a people's army born of the people's revolution.
